name: TIA Portal Control
description: Control Siemens TIA Portal V18+ for PLC programming via Openness API and UI automation.

bridgePort.label: Bridge Port
bridgePort.help: Localhost port for the .NET bridge sidecar (default: 19847).

bridgePath.label: Bridge Executable Path
bridgePath.help: Path to TiaPortalBridge.exe. Auto-detected from the extension directory if omitted.

tiaVersion.label: TIA Portal Version
tiaVersion.help: TIA Portal version to connect to (V18 or V19).

autoStartBridge.label: Auto-Start Bridge
autoStartBridge.help: Automatically start the .NET bridge sidecar when the plugin loads.

operationTimeoutMs.label: Operation Timeout (ms)
operationTimeoutMs.help: Timeout for TIA Portal operations in milliseconds.
